division_title: Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act
text: The State of California and its agencies and political subdivisions are exempt from the registration requirements of this division.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.86. Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act [34680 - 34693]
##### § 34686

The State of California and its agencies and political subdivisions are exempt from the registration requirements of this division.

*(Added by Stats. 2017, Ch. 421, Sec. 40. (SB 19) Effective January 1, 2018. Operative July 1, 2018, pursuant to Section 34693.)*

subsections.text: The State of California and its agencies and political subdivisions are exempt from the registration requirements of this division.
